reviews.comment:
Amplio parque con una hermosa arboleda. La proveeduría no tenía mucha variedad de cosas pero tiene restaurante. La pileta muy linda y tenés que pagar aparte.. la entrada para socios es gratuita pero para invitados cuesta 160 por persona más 160 por vehículo.. para acampar para socios algo de 600 pesos y para invitados 900. Tiene cancha de padle tenis plaza para niños quincho cerrados mesas y parrillas. Muy bien cuidado.

(Translated by Google)
A large park with a beautiful grove of trees. The grocery store didn't have a wide selection, but it does have a restaurant. The pool is very nice, but you have to pay extra. Members are free to enter, but guests pay 160 pesos per person plus 160 pesos per vehicle. Camping for members is around 600 pesos, and for guests, 900 pesos. It has a paddle tennis court, a children's playground, an enclosed barbecue area, tables, and grills. Very well maintained.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvNm9ERGRnEAE

reviews.comment:
ya fuimos varias veces, nos gusta la tranquilad del lugar y el ambiente familiar, todo muy prolijo y ordenado, baños siempre limpios , muy amplio el predio y  entrada para acompañante $160. el acompañante no puede salir y volver a entrar.
Puntos a mejorar: mantenimiento de los juegos de
los chicos , las hamacas de bebés estan rotas, y el sector de parrilas , las bachas para lavar , algunas no tienen agua y otras tienen agua acumulada.

(Translated by Google)
We've been there several times. We like the quietness of the place and the family atmosphere. Everything is very neat and tidy. The bathrooms are always clean. The grounds are very spacious, and the entrance fee for a companion is $160. The companion cannot leave and re-enter.
Areas for improvement: maintenance of the children's playground equipment.
The baby swings are broken, and the barbecue grill area and sinks for washing dishes are broken. Some have no water, and others have standing water.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvOHNhRVZREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buen predio. Despensa incluída. Mucho espacio verde, variedad de parrillas y mesas.  Duchas, sanitarios y vestidores cómodos y limpios. Piscina para adultos, piscina para chicos, ambas muy limpias y cuidadas. No suele haber mucha gente. No se puede ingresar con mascotas/animales. Canchas de fútbol, tenis, paddle. Espacio para camping. Parcelas para casillas rodantes.Valores enero 2019 piscinas $160 (socio y no socio). Ingreso al predio $160 (socios no pagan). Automóvil invitado $160 (socio no paga). Demás precios en pagina web.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice property. Pantry included. Plenty of green space, a variety of grills and tables. Comfortable and clean showers, restrooms, and changing rooms. There is an adult pool and a children's pool, both very clean and well-maintained. It's not usually crowded. Pets are not allowed. There are soccer, tennis, and paddle courts. Camping space. RV pitches. January 2019 pool rates $160 (members and non-members). Entrance fee $160 (members free). Guest car $160 (members free). Other prices available on the website.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvNU9hQlNBEAE
